reviews.review_msg: Lectures are clear and informative. He is not hard to understand at all if you're listening. Homework is directly related to lecture slides and the exam questions come straight from the homework. Open ended final project but Jie provides good feedback to help narrow your scope and make things as doable as possible.
Great lectures and course content, with plenty of real world application. Professor is engaging since it is his area of research. Fair grading and he provides worked examples in tutorial.

Take this course if you are interested in Matlab. All the course is based on the knowledge of the Matlab. He explains the material of the course clearly. Do not miss the midterm exam otherwise you will be in trouble for your final project.
